mapper.select: SELECT id , group_id , endpoint , p256dh , auth FROM members WHERE group_id = #{group_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO push_subscriptions (endpoint, p256dh, auth) VALUES (#{endpoint}, #{p256dh}, #{auth})
INSERT INTO push (id, group_id, msg, target_url, send_status, fail_reason, payload_json) VALUES (#{id}, #{group_id}, #{msg}, #{target_url}, #{send_status}, #{fail_reason}, #{payload_json})
mapper.select: SELECT group_id , msg , target_url , send_status , DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at , read_YN FROM push WHERE send_status = 'SUCCESS' AND id = #{id} ORDER BY created_at DESC
